Record.statement_en: You are talking to a classmate who just moved here from here another country and doesn't speak much Urdu. What's the best thing to do?

options.option_en: Talk loudly so they can understand you better.

Just talk to your other friends and ignore them until they learn English.

options.option_en: "Do not worry, you can try out next year."
